---
title: "Cabo Verde is through!"
author: "Håvard Strand"
description: ""
date: "2026-06-27 09:44"
categories: [Update]
---

# Cabo Verde came second, and Iran can still make it

Christian is back in a comfortable lead, and Scott is back in second place, 30 points behind

Phillip was Rocket of the Round with 89 of 100 points possible. Well done.

```{r standings, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
source(here::here("R", "plot_standings.R"))
this_match <- 66
lag        <- 4
plot_standings(this_match, lag)
gapdata <- plot_standings_return(this_match, lag)
```


```{r show, echo=FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics("standings.png")
```
